sourceMovie.title: Killer Elite
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Killer Elite works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: American Assassin
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Killer Elite clicked for you, American Assassin (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Killer Elite?
faq.answer: Try American Assassin, Weekend in Taipei, Man on Fire—each shares DNA with Killer Elite while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Killer Elite?
faq.answer: Killer Elite (2011) is best described as Action, Adventure, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Killer Elite worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
